positive: A minimalist, abstract celestial body design featuring a glowing crescent moon and stylized constellation lines forming geometric shapes, surrounded by wisps of nebulae and scattered stylized stars. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, utilizing negative space effectively. Style: Flat graphic design mixed with ethereal watercolor textures. Color palette: Deep midnight blue, celestial violet, metallic gold, and soft teal accents. Lighting: High contrast, backlit glow emanating from the moon and stars. Print-friendly details: Isolated elements with clean, sharp lines suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Highly detailed, vector graphic feel.
negative: blur, noise, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, busy, messy, realism, photorealistic
